heading: Examples
body:
The following examples show how to retrieve the details of the scores
in the results for the following:

- Queries run using [text](text-ref), [near](near-ref),
  [compound](compound-ref), and [embeddedDocument](embedded-document-ref) operators.

- Queries with scores modified using [function](scoring-function) option
  expressions.

> **Tip:** To view details of the score recursively in the arrays of objects,
> configure the settings in [mongosh](mongodb-shell) by running the following:
>
> ```shell
> config.set('inspectDepth', Infinity)
> ```
